title: Old Man's Journey

notes:
Game is beautiful and run fine with very good performances. And I can finish the game without major issue.

But, it seems there's a matter displaying the "memories" scene, where instead  
of an animation, I get a completely white screen.

Apart from this, switching to the desktop make the game appear as a black screen with a small icon in top left of the screen, double click on it display the game back, but the mouse cursor display both the game one and system one, and there's no more possibility to interact with the game, even with the keyboard (esc kay to accessing setting for example).
title: Old Man's Journey

notes:
I finished the game without any tweaks. Only afterwards did I find out that I was missing the old man's memories during the cloud transitions.

The memories videos are in "~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Old Man's Journey/Old Mans Journey_Data/StreamingAssets/Video/" and can be viewed with a regular video player.
